basics.name: Shizhong Tan
basics.label: Doctoral Researcher in Mechatronic Engineering
basics.summary: Doctoral researcher at Huazhong University of Science and Technology working on high-precision robotic milling for large-scale aerospace components, with interests in robot dynamics, machine learning, control engineering, contour-error compensation, and intelligent manufacturing.

location.address: School of Mechanical Science and Engineering, Huazhong University of Science and Technology
